name: Järbo Garn
description: One of Sweden's oldest and most beloved yarn brands, producing quality yarns since 1922. Known for their wide range of wool, cotton, and blended yarns.

name: Ullcentrum i Öland
description: A traditional wool workshop on the island of Öland, processing locally sourced Swedish wool into high-quality spinning fiber and yarn.
orderDetails: Order by phone or email via the contact page

name: Klippan Yllefabrik
description: A historic woolen mill founded in 1879, producing sustainable textiles and yarn from natural fibers. Famous for their throws and blankets as well as quality yarn.

name: Wålstedts Textilverkstad
description: A small-scale textile workshop in the heart of Dalarna specializing in hand-spun and small-batch yarn made from Swedish wool breeds.
orderDetails: Contact via email to place an order

name: Rätvisan
description: A sustainable yarn brand focused on ethically sourced Scandinavian fibers, offering naturally dyed and undyed skeins for hand knitters and weavers.

name: Gotlandsgarn
description: Producers of authentic Gotland wool yarn, made from the native Gotland sheep breed known for its silky, lustrous fiber with natural grey tones.

name: Västergötlands Ullspinneri
description: A regional wool spinning mill processing fleece from local farms in Västra Götaland into sturdy, rustic yarns ideal for traditional Scandinavian patterns.
orderDetails: Order by phone or visit the mill directly

name: Hifa-2 Trådfabrik
description: A Swedish thread and yarn manufacturer with decades of experience, producing roving, weaving yarn, and specialty craft threads for the Nordic market.
